original_prompt: continue your work for optimizing this code @scratch/test_completion.py

tasks.title: Improve error handling with specific exception types
tasks.description: Refactor the exception handling block in send_completion_request to catch ConnectionError and Timeout separately from general RequestException, returning more descriptive error messages for each case.

tasks.title: Add logging instead of silent error returns
tasks.description: Replace the silent error return dict with proper logging using Python's logging module. Log errors at ERROR level and include the function name and parameters when available.
